taglines: Books have never felt this alive

Join those who keep books alive

Where every author finds a voice

home.heroSubAuth: Find your clubs, your lists and the latest community posts.

fallbackTestimonials.f1: Frollot changed the way I discover books. The reading clubs are fantastic!
fallbackTestimonials.f2: Thanks to Frollot, I was able to publish my first novel and reach readers worldwide.
fallbackTestimonials.f3: A platform that truly connects book industry players. My sales increased by 40%.
fallbackTestimonials.f4: Ordering a book has never been easier. Customer service is responsive.
fallbackTestimonials.f5: It's more than an online bookstore. It's a community of book lovers.
fallbackTestimonials.f6: The interface is modern, the books are well presented. The review system really helps you choose.
fallbackTestimonials.f7: As a proofreader, I receive quality requests. The tools are professional.
fallbackTestimonials.f8: Frollot offers an exceptional showcase for book professionals. Networking is seamless.

home.trustMessage: Thousands of users trust us every day.
home.trustReturnsSub: No questions asked, quick and easy

faq.heroSub: Find answers to the most common questions about our books, orders and services.
faq.intro: Can't find the answer to your question? Don't hesitate to contact us — our team is here to help.
faq.q1: How do I place an order?
faq.a1: Browse our catalog, add the books you want to your cart, then click "Proceed to checkout". Enter your details and shipping address, choose your payment method (Mobicash, Airtel Money, cash or Visa card) and confirm. You will receive an email confirmation.
faq.a2: Orders are shipped within 5 to 10 business days in Gabon. For Port-Gentil and surroundings: 5 to 7 days. For other cities (Libreville, Lambaréné, Franceville, etc.): 7 to 10 days. You receive a tracking email upon shipment.
faq.a3: Shipping is free from 25,000 FCFA of purchases. Below this amount, shipping costs are 2,000 FCFA. Fees are calculated automatically at checkout.
faq.q4: How can I track my order?
faq.a4: Once your order is shipped, you receive an email with tracking information. You can also check the status of your orders in your account area (My Account > My Orders) after logging in.
faq.a5: Yes. You have 30 days from receipt to return a non-conforming or damaged book. The book must be in perfect condition (unread, not annotated). Contact us by email, phone or via the contact form to report your return. Refund is made within 14 days of receipt.
faq.q6: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a6: We accept Mobicash, Airtel Money, cash and Visa cards. All transactions are secure.
faq.q7: How do I submit a manuscript?
faq.a7: Go to the "Submit a manuscript" page and fill in the form with your file attached. Our reading committee reviews each submission and contacts you within 2 to 4 weeks. The decision is communicated by email.
faq.a8: For now, our deliveries are limited to Gabon. We are working on expanding our service to other countries in the sub-region. Stay connected to our newsletter to be informed of developments.
faq.a9: By email: contact@frollot.com. By phone: +241 65 34 88 87 or +241 76 59 35 35. Or via our contact form on the site. We typically respond within 24 hours. Hours: Mon-Fri 7:30am-6:30pm, Sat 10am-6:30pm.

cgv.heroSub: These terms govern book sales by Frollot.
cgv.intro: By placing an order on our site, you accept these terms and conditions of sale without reservation. We invite you to read them carefully before any transaction.
cgv.section1p1: These Terms and Conditions of Sale apply to all book sales made by Frollot, a company based in Port-Gentil (Gabon), Avenue Ivan Le Terrible. They govern the relationship between Frollot and its customers, whether individuals or professionals.
cgv.section1p2: Any order placed on our site implies full and unconditional acceptance of these terms. We reserve the right to modify these conditions at any time; the applicable conditions are those in effect on the day of the order.
cgv.section2p1: The books offered for sale are those listed in our online catalog. Photos and descriptions are as accurate as possible; however, slight variations may exist. Prices are indicated in CFA Francs (FCFA) and are valid subject to availability.
cgv.section2p2: Order validation constitutes acceptance of prices, quantities and shipping costs. A confirmation is sent to you by email. We reserve the right to cancel any order in case of payment difficulty, incorrect address or suspicious behavior.
cgv.section3p1: Prices are indicated in FCFA including tax. Shipping costs are calculated based on the order amount: free shipping from 25,000 FCFA, otherwise 2,000 FCFA. Payment is due at the time of order.
cgv.section3p2: We accept the following payment methods: Mobicash, Airtel Money, cash and Visa cards. Transactions are secure. In case of payment refusal, the order will be cancelled.
cgv.section4p1: Orders are shipped within 5 to 10 business days in Gabon. Delivery times may vary depending on destination and transport conditions. You receive a shipping confirmation email with tracking information.
cgv.section4p2: In case of delay or issue, contact us at contact@frollot.com or by phone. The risk of transport is transferred to the customer upon handover of the parcel to the carrier.
cgv.section5p1: In accordance with our return policy, you have 30 days from receipt to return a non-conforming or damaged book. The book must be in perfect condition (unread, not annotated). Returns for defects or errors on our part are at our expense.
cgv.section5p2: For any return request, contact us by email, phone or via our contact form. Refund is made within 14 days after receipt and verification of the return.
cgv.section6p1: All site content (text, images, logos, layouts) is protected by copyright and belongs to Frollot or its rights holders. Any unauthorized reproduction, representation or exploitation is prohibited.
cgv.section7p1: Frollot commits to delivering products that conform to the order. Our liability is limited to the value of the products ordered. We cannot be held responsible for indirect damages (delay, loss of profit, etc.) except in case of gross negligence.
cgv.section8p1: Data collected during the order is processed in accordance with our
cgv.section8p1End: It is used for order management, customer relations and, with your consent, for sending our newsletter.
cgv.section9p1: In case of dispute, an amicable solution will be sought before any legal action. Gabonese law applies. For any questions, contact us at contact@frollot.com or +241 65 34 88 87.

terms.heroSub: Terms of use for the Frollot website.
terms.intro: Access to the site is subject to these terms. By browsing, you accept them.
terms.section1p1: The Terms of Use govern access to the Frollot website (Port-Gentil, Gabon): catalog, orders, author information.
terms.section2p1: Access is free. Some features (ordering, account area) require registration. We may modify or suspend the site without notice.
terms.section3p1: Use must comply with the law. Prohibited: fraud, hacking, illegal content, spam.
terms.section4p1: Content is protected. Any unauthorized reproduction is prohibited.

privacy.heroSub: Frollot is committed to protecting your personal data.
privacy.dataCollectionText: Data collected through the manuscript submission form (name, email, phone, description, file) is used exclusively for the editorial selection process. It is neither sold nor shared with third parties.
privacy.submissionText: By submitting a manuscript, you agree that Frollot will review your work and contact you by email within 2 to 4 weeks. The reading committee's decision is final.
privacy.retentionText: Rejected manuscripts are kept for 12 months then deleted. Accepted manuscripts are kept as needed for the editorial process.
privacy.rightsText: In accordance with the GDPR, you may request access to, correction or deletion of your data by contacting us at

cookies.heroSub: How we use cookies on our site.
cookies.intro: This site uses cookies to improve your experience and the functioning of our services.
cookies.whatText: A cookie is a small file stored by your browser. It remembers information (session, preferences) for smoother browsing.
cookies.typesText: Essential: login, cart, security. Preferences: language, display. Analytics: visitor statistics.
cookies.managementText: You can configure your browser to refuse or delete cookies. Disabling certain cookies may limit functionality.

delivery.heroSub1: Fast delivery in Gabon and simplified return conditions.
delivery.heroSub2: Your books with complete peace of mind.
delivery.intro: At Frollot, we do everything possible to ensure your books reach you quickly and in perfect condition. This page details our shipping conditions in Gabon as well as our return policy, designed for your peace of mind.
delivery.delaysp1: Your order is prepared and shipped within 5 to 10 business days in Gabon. We handle each order with care to ensure your books arrive in perfect condition.
delivery.delaysp2: For Port-Gentil and surroundings, expect 5 to 7 days. For other cities in Gabon (Libreville, Lambaréné, Franceville, Mouila, Oyem, etc.), allow 7 to 10 days. Times may vary depending on the season and transport conditions.
delivery.delaysp3: As soon as your package is shipped, you receive an email notification to track your delivery in real time.
delivery.ratesNote: Shipping costs are calculated automatically at checkout. Take advantage of free shipping by grouping several books in a single order — it's the perfect opportunity to discover multiple authors from our catalog.
delivery.zonesp1: We deliver everywhere in Gabon: Port-Gentil, Libreville, Lambaréné, Franceville, Mouila, Oyem and all other cities in the country.
delivery.zonesp2: Our distribution network covers the entire Gabonese territory. Whether you are in a city or a more remote location, we are committed to getting your books to you as quickly as possible.
delivery.trackingp1: Once your order is shipped, you receive an email with tracking information. You can also check the status of your orders in your
delivery.trackingp2: In case of delay or questions about your delivery, don't hesitate to contact us. Our team is available to help you until you receive your package.
delivery.returnsp1: You can return a book within 30 days of receipt, provided it is in perfect condition (unread, not annotated, original packaging intact). We allow this period to give you time to check your order at your convenience.
delivery.returnsp2: Returns are accepted for: printing defects, books damaged during delivery, or order errors on our part. In these cases, return shipping costs are at our expense.
delivery.returnsp3: For any other reason (change of mind, duplicate, etc.), returns are still possible within 30 days but return shipping costs are the customer's responsibility. Refund is made upon receipt and verification of the book.
delivery.procedureIntro: You can contact us to report a return in three ways:
delivery.procedureNote: Provide us with the order number and the reason for the return. We will confirm the handling and indicate the steps to follow.
delivery.step1: Contact us using one of the methods above to report the return
delivery.step2: Carefully package the book in its original condition
delivery.step3: Ship to our address: Avenue Ivan Le Terrible, Port-Gentil
delivery.step4: Refund within 14 days after receipt and verification
delivery.ctaText: Our team is available to assist you. Whether it's about a timeframe, package tracking, a return or any other question, don't hesitate to contact us. We typically respond within 24 hours.

support.heroSub: Our team is at your disposal to answer all your questions.
support.intro: Whether you have a question about an order, a technical issue or need information about our services, we are here to help. Choose the channel that suits you best.
support.emailText1: For any questions, write to us at
support.emailText2: We typically respond within 24 hours, Monday to Saturday.
support.emailNote: Include your order number if your request is about a delivery or return.
support.phoneText: Call us for a quick response:
support.addressText: You can also visit us at our headquarters:
support.addressValue: Avenue Ivan Le Terrible, Port-Gentil, Gabon
support.addressNote: We welcome you on site for any question about our books, manuscript submissions or current orders.
support.formText: Use our online form to send us a structured message. Ideal for detailed requests, complaints or partnership proposals.

listings.subtitle: Manage the books you sell on Frollot.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Your alerts and updates
notifications.emptyDesc: You have no notifications at the moment.

templates.title: Coupon templates
templates.name: Template name
templates.emptyDesc: Create your first template to send coupons to your customers.

send.title: Send a coupon
send.confirmMessage: You are about to send the coupon "{{name}}" to {{count}} recipient(s). Continue?
send.throttled: Send limit reached. Please try again in 1 hour.

section.templateHelp: Select the coupon you want to offer to your customers.
section.recipientsHelp: Select your existing customers or add emails manually.
section.customizeHelp: Add a personal message and adjust the duration if you wish.

preview.placeholder: Select a template to see the preview

send.confirmWarning: This send is final. Recipients will immediately receive an email with their coupon.
send.maxRecipientsHelp: Maximum 20 recipients per send. For more, do multiple sends.
send.customMessageHelp: This message will be displayed at the top of the email received by the recipient.
send.customExpiryHelp: Leave empty to use the template's default duration. The coupon will expire after this many days.
send.customMessagePlaceholder: Hello, here's a little gift from us!
send.emptyTemplatesDesc: Create or clone a template from the library before sending coupons.
send.emptyCustomersDesc: Your customers will appear here once they have placed an order.

issued.title: Issued coupons
issued.revokeConfirm: Revoke this coupon? The recipient will be notified.
issued.retryConfirm: Do you want to retry sending this coupon?
issued.retrySuccess: Retry triggered. Status will update shortly.
issued.emptyDesc: Send your first coupon from the send page.

received.title: My coupons
received.emptyDesc: You haven't received any coupons yet.

library.title: Frollot Library
library.subtitle: 30 ready-to-use templates, created by the Frollot team
library.empty: No templates available in this category.

category.SAISONNIER_desc: Offers tied to a period or holiday
category.DESTOCKAGE_desc: Clear your stock with a discount

form.commercialTitle_placeholder: E.g.: Black Friday –30% on the full catalog
form.commercialTitle_help: Title shown to the customer in the email and on the coupon
form.subtitle: Tagline
form.subtitle_help: Short phrase that makes customers want to use the coupon
form.internalName_help: Only visible to you, used to find this template
form.marketingDescription_placeholder: E.g.: Enjoy –30% on our entire collection for Black Friday...
form.marketingDescription_help: Marketing text shown to the customer in the email
form.tags_help: Keywords to find this template (e.g.: promo, summer, bookstore)
form.maxDiscountAmount_help: Maximum discount amount even if the percentage would be higher
form.firstOrderOnly_help: This coupon can only be used on the customer's first purchase
form.minCustomerAgeDays_help: Days since registration. Empty = no condition
form.validFrom_help: Date from which this template can generate coupons. Empty = immediately
form.validUntil_help: Date after which this template can no longer be used. Empty = no limit
form.totalQuota_help: Maximum number of coupons sendable from this template. Empty = unlimited
form.perCustomerLimit_help: Maximum number of coupons a single customer can receive

myTemplates.emptyDesc: You haven't created any templates yet. Browse the Frollot library to get started quickly.

emitterSelector.orgHelp: Select the organization issuing this coupon.

noContext.title: No issuing context
